user_claim: Customer: Hi, I found new damage on my car after it was parked outside overnight. | Support: Sorry to hear that. Can you describe what changed? | Customer: The back of the car has a dent now. It was not there before. | Support: Did anything else break or is it mostly body damage? | Customer: Mostly the rear bumper area. I attached the photo I took this morning.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the rear of the car, including the rear bumper and surrounding body panels, which are the areas claimed to be damaged. The lighting and angle are sufficient to assess the damage.
claim_status_justification: The image img_1 clearly shows significant deformation and damage to the rear bumper and the body panel above it, consistent with the customer's claim of a dent in the back of the car.

user_claim: Customer: Parking lot mein meri car ko scrape lag gaya. | Support: Aap kis type ka damage report karna chahte hain? | Customer: Front side par mark aa gaya hai, bumper ke upar. | Support: Light damage hai ya body par scratch? | Customer: Light theek hai, front bumper par scratch hai. Photos upload kar diye hain.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The provided images clearly show the front bumper of a white car, with visible damage consistent with the customer's claim of a scratch. The lighting and angle in the second image are sufficient for assessment.
claim_status_justification: Image img_2 clearly shows significant scuffing and tearing on the front bumper, consistent with the customer's claim of a scratch on the front bumper.

user_claim: Customer: I am opening a claim for my windshield. | Support: What happened? | Customer: A small stone hit it while I was driving and now there is a crack spreading from that spot. | Support: Is the car otherwise okay? | Customer: Yes, this is only about the front glass. I added the pictures I have.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images clearly show the windshield and the damage claimed.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a significant crack on the windshield, consistent with the user's claim of damage from a stone impact.

user_claim: Customer: Someone clipped my car while it was parked. | Support: What part was hit? | Customer: The side mirror got damaged. It is not sitting the way it should anymore. | Support: Was there any damage to the door too? | Customer: I did not notice anything else major, just the mirror.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The image clearly shows the side mirror of a car with visible damage.
claim_status_justification: The image shows a cracked side mirror, which aligns with the customer's claim.

user_claim: Customer: I want to file this as bumper damage. | Support: Can you tell me what happened? | Customer: The car was tapped from behind and now the back looks damaged. | Support: Are you asking for review of the rear side? | Customer: Yes, the back bumper. It looks pretty bad to me, so I uploaded both photos.
evidence_standard_met_reason: The images clearly show the rear bumper of the car and provide a view of the claimed damage.
claim_status_justification: Image img_1 clearly shows a dent on the rear bumper. The second image, img_2, shows the rear of the car and the bumper, but the dent is not visible from that angle. The user's history indicates a pattern of exaggerated claims.
